publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Psalter
Mazmura Dāwit
msItem.incipit:
ረሲዕ፡ ዘይገብር፡ ሕስመ፡ በርእሱ።
ኃጥእ፡ ዘይኤብስ፡ ላዕለ፡ ፈጣሪሁ፡ በርእሱ።
መስተሣልቅ፡ ዘይስሕቅ፡ በነዉረ፡ ቢጹ።
፩፡ ፍካሬ፡ ዘጻድቃን፡ ወዘኃጥኣን፨
መዝሙር፡ ዘዳዊት፡ ሃሌ፡ ሉያ፨
ብፁዕ፡ ብእሲ፡ ዘኢሖረ፡ በምክረ፡ ረሲዓን።
ወዘኢቆመ፡ ውስተ፡ ፍኖተ፡ ኃጥኣን።
ወዘኢነበረ፡ ውስተ፡ መንበረ፡ መስተሣልቃን፨

msItem.title: Book of Odes
msItem.incipit: መኃልየ፡ ነቢያት፡ ወጸሎቱ፡ ለሙሴ፡ ፩፡ ንሴብሖ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ስቡሕ፡ ዘተሰብሐ፨ ፈረስ፡ ወመስተፅዕናነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፨
፩፡ ንሴብሖ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ስቡሕ፡ ዘተሰብሐ፨ ፈረስ፡ ወመስተፅዕናነ፡ ወረወ፡ ውስተ፡ ባሕር፨

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Second Song of Moses (ጸሎተ፡ ሙሴ፡ ዘዳግም፡ ሕግ፡) (same as LIT2278salota)
Book of Odes, Third Song of Moses (ጸሎተ፡ ሙሴ፡ ዘሣልስ፡) (same as LIT2703salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Hannah (ጸሎተ፡ ሓና፡ እመ፡ ሳሙኤል፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2257salota)
Book of Odes, Prayer of Hezekiah (ጸሎተ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ይሁዳ፡) (same as LIT2258salota)
Book of Odes, Prayer of Manasseh (ጸሎተ፡ ምናሴ፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2265salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Jonah (ጸሎተ፡ ዮናስ፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2274salota)
msItem.incipit: ፯፡ ጸራኅኩ፡ በምንዳቤየ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላኪየ ፨

msItem.title: Book of Odes, First Song of the Three Youths in the Furnace (ጸሎተ፡ ዳንኤል፡ ነቢይ፡ ስብሐት፡ ዘእምኣዛርያ፡) (same as LIT2250salota)
Book of Odes, Second Song of the Three Youths (ጸሎተ፡ ሠለስቱ፡ ደቂቅ፡) (same as LIT2271salota)
Book of Odes, Third Song of the Three Youths (ኀበ፡ ባረኩ፡ ኣናንያ፡ ወኣዛርያ፡ ወሚሳኤል፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡) (same as LIT1566hababa)

incipit.hi: ኀበ፡ ባረኩ፡ አናንያ፡ ወአዛርያ፡ ወሚሳኤል፡ ለእግዝር።

msItem.incipit: ፲፡ ይባርክዎ፡ ኵሉ፡ ግብረ፡ እግዚእ፡ ለእግዚኣብሔር ፨

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Habakkuk (ጸሎተ፡ ዕንባቆም፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2251salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Isaiah (ጸሎተ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2259salota)
msItem.incipit: ፲፪፡ በሌሊት፡ ትገይስ፡ መንፈስየ፡ ኀቤከ፡ አምላኪየ፨

msItem.title: Book of Odes, Song of Our Lady Mary (ጸሎተ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡) or Magnificat (same as LIT1827Magnif)
Book of Odes, Song of Zachariah (ጸሎተ፡ ዘካርያስ፡ ካህን፡) (same as LIT2275salota)
Book of Odes, Song of Simeon, or Nunc Dimittis (ጸሎተ፡ ስምዖን፡ ነቢይ፡) (same as LIT2272salota)
Song of Songs
msItem.incipit: ፩፡ ይስዕመኒ፡ በስዕመተ፡ አፉሁ፨ አዳም፡ አጥባትኪ፡ እም፡ ወይን፨
msItem.explicit: ፪፻፡ ለእለ፡ የዓቅቡ፡ ፍሬሁ፨ አእላፍ፡ ፍሬሁ፡ በበጊዜሁ፤ ዓፀደ፡ ወይን፡ ሊተ፡ እንተ፡ አንጻርየ፨ እንዘ፡ ይነብር፡ ውስተ፡ ገነት፡ ወካልኣን፡ ይሬእይዎ፨ ቃልከ፡ አስምዓኒ፨ ጕየይ፡ አንተ፡ ወልድ፡ እኁየ፡ ወተመሰላ፡ ለወይጠል፤ ወእመ፡ አኮ፡ ከመ፡ ወሬዛ፡ ሀየል፡ ውስተ፡ አድባር፡ ድኁኃን፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām
msItem.incipit:
ውዳሴ፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘሰኑይ። ፈቀደ፡ እግዚእ፡ ያግዕዞ፡ ለአዳም፡ ኅዙነ፡ ወትኩዘ፡ ልብ፡ ወያግብኦ፡ ኀበ፡ ዘትካት፡ መንበሩ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ቅድስት። ሰረቀ፡ በሥጋ፡ እምድንግል፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ዘርአ፡ ብእሲ፡ ወአድኃነነ፤ ለሔዋን፡ እንተ፡ አስሐታ፡
ከይሲ፤ ፈትሐ፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ ብዙኃ፡ አበዝኆ፡ ለሕማምኪ፡ ወለፃዕርኪ፤ ሠምረ፡ ልቡ፡ ኀበ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወአግዓዛ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለ፡ ቅ፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Monday
msItem.incipit: ውዳሴ፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘሰኑይ። ፈቀደ፡ እግዚእያግዕዞ፡ ለአዳም፡ ኅዙነ፡ ወትኩዘ፡ ልብ፡ ወያግብኦ፡ ኀበ፡ ዘትካት፡ መንበሩ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ቅድስት። ሰረቀ፡ በሥጋ፡ እምድንግል፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ዘርአ፡ ብእሲ፡ ወአድኃነነ፤ ለሔዋን፡ እንተ፡ አስሐታ፡ ከይሲ፤ ፈትሐ፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ እብዘ፡ ይብል፡ ብዙኃ፡ አበዝኆ፡ ለሕማምኪ፡ ወለፃዕርኪ፤ ሠምረ፡ ልቡ፡ ኀበ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወአግዓዛ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለ፡ ቅ፨

msItem.title: Wǝddāse Māryām, : Tuesday
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Wednesday
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Thursday
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Friday
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Saturday
Wǝddāse Māryām, : Sunday
msItem.explicit: ብኪ፡ ግርማ፡ ራእይ፡ ዘየዓቢ፡ እምግርማ፡ ሱራፌል፡ ወኪሩቤል፡ አንቲ፡ በአማን፡ ምክሐ፡ ዘመድነ፡ ወሰአሊት፡ ሕይወት፡ ለነፍሳቲነ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ወመድኃኒነ፤ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ያጽንዓነ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ውስተ፡ አሚነ፡ ዚአሁ፡ ይጸግወነ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ወምሕረቶ፤ ወይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡ ምሕረቱ፡ ሰ፡ ለ፡ ቅ፨

msItem.title: ʾAnqaṣa bǝrhān
msItem.incipit:
ውዳሴ፡ ወግናይ፡ ዘእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲ
ተ፡ አምላክ፨
ቅድስት፡ ወብፅዕት፡ ስብሕት፡ ወቡርክት፡ ክብርት፡ ወልዕልት፡ አንቀጸ፡ ብርሃን፡ መዓርገ፡ ሕይወት፡ ወማኅደረ፡ መለኮት፡ ቅድስተ፡ ቅዱሳን፨
msItem.explicit: ለእለ፡ የአምኑ፡ በጸሎታ፡ ሰአሊ፡ ለነ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ያጽንዓነ፡ በርትዕት፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ውስተ፡ አሚነ፡ ዚአሁ፤ ወዘአቡሁ፡ ወዘቅዱስ፡ መንፈሱ፡ ወይጸግወነ፡ ሣህሎ፡ ወምሕረቶ፡ ወይስረይ፡ ኃጢአተነ፡ በብዝኃ፡

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in pencil in the centre of the bottom of the recto.

list.item:
10
3, stub after 5 4, stub after 5 7, stub after 2 8, stub after 2

supportDesc.condition: Traces of intensive use, but the condition of the manuscript is good. Blind-tooled ornamentation on the outer sides slightly abraded. One additional note on washed out.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from .
The number of characters: 1 line on f. - 33; 1 line - 28, 1 line - 29, 1 line - 26.
The number of characters: 1 line - 14; 1 line - 15; 1 line - 16; 1 line - 15.
Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from .

handNote.t:desc: Regular, fine; by a trained scribe.

decoNote.t:desc: Pen-work text dividers after each group of ten Psalms and other texts, finely drawn up to (straight and wavy lines, black dots), simpler design starting from (red and black dotted lines).
Monochrome drawing depicting St Mary, to the left, and St Ephrem the Syrian, to the right. St Mary performs a gesture of blessing with her right hand.
رسم أبيض وأسود يصوّر القديسة مريم، إلى اليسار، والقديس أفرام السرياني، إلى اليمين. القديسة مريم تحرّك يدها اليمنى علامة البركة. العنوان:
decoNote.note: The legend is written in a crude hand, the vowel marker of ዝ is placed wrongly (at the right leg of the letter, and turned to the right).

item.t:desc: Ownership note in red stating that the owner of the manuscript was ʾAbuna Gabra Māryām from Gondar.

q.hi: ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘአቡነ፡ ገብረ፡ ማርያም፡ ዘብዘብሔረ፡ ጎንደር፡

item.t:desc: Erased note, the condemnation is still partly legible.
Ownership note in Arabic stating that the manuscript belongs to Dayr as-Suryān, dated to 1948.
item.q:
وقف إلى دير السريان يكون محروم كل من يخرجه القمص أرسانيوس
١٤/٤/١٩٤٨
مزامير ونبوات سليمان وتسبحة العذراء بالجئز

item.t:desc: Part of the line or the entire line are written in smaller script, in the mentioned and most of the other folia.
Two omitted lines are added in the upper margin, in the same hand (but the ink is of a different tone), their place in the text is indicated with a tamallas-sign.
Stamps of Dayr as-Suryān, here and in a few other places.
Line take-ups, carefully marked with black and red lines.
Line take-ups, carefully marked with black and red lines.
Partly erased note, only the first word is clearly legible.

binding.decoNote: Ethiopian. Two wooden boards covered with reddish brown blind-tooled leather. Mitred blind-tooled turn-ins. Blind-tooled leather overback (possibly secondary, of somewhat different colour). A square mirror glued into the recession on the inner side of the front board. The endbands nearly intact. Two pairs of sewing stations.

Leaf string markers (coloured threads) inserted in the upper part of
. A loose red thread is placed between and .

history.origin: منتصف القرن الثامن عشر / منتصف القرن التاسع عشر The manuscript can be dated palaeographically to the mid-eighteenth/mid-nineteenth century.
history.acquisition: It was owned later by ʾAbuna Gabra Māryām from Gondar who brought it to Dayr as-Suryān.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.t:change: Updated encoding of binding, small adjustments
Updated additions, binding, decoration according to manuscript description provided by Denis Nosnitsin
